title: AriaCast Metadata WebSocket Message
description: JSON text frames exchanged on the /metadata WebSocket endpoint.

oneOf.title: metadata broadcast (server → subscribers)
oneOf.description: Sent by the server on connect and on every metadata change.

oneOf.title: update (client → server)
oneOf.description: Client pushes a partial or full metadata update.

oneOf.title: get (client → server)
oneOf.description: Client requests the current metadata state.

oneOf.title: ack (server → client)
oneOf.description: Server acknowledges an update or clear request.

oneOf.title: error (server → client)
oneOf.description: Server reports an error processing the last client message.
